name: List with Detail (Repeating Items)
summary: ListWithDetail for collecting a variable number of complex items with full layout control
whenToUse: Collecting multiple entries like family members, vendors, or work history
When each item has multiple fields and you need control over their layout
Preferred over Object Array for items with 3+ fields or nested data
notes: ListWithDetail shows a list panel on the left and detail form on the right
The `detail` object in options defines the layout for each item — you have full layout control
Scopes inside `detail` are relative to the array item, NOT the root: use `#/properties/firstName` not `#/properties/familyMembers/items/properties/firstName`
Use `items.type: "object"` in the data schema to define the shape of each list entry
Users can add/remove items dynamically; the list displays item count
